findings.issue: ZH term definition uses 'IT护照考试' — non-standard product name. Official JP is 'ITパスポート試験'; ZH corpus should use 'ITパスポート試験' or 'IT Passport考试'.
findings.excerpt_jp: ITパスポート試験における「表」の別名。
findings.recommendation: Replace '护照' with retained JP brand name: 'ITパスポート試験中「表」的别称。'

findings.issue: ZH surface 'NoSQL数据库' adds '数据库' not present in JP surface 'NoSQL (Not Only SQL)' — surface inflation changes term identity.
findings.recommendation: ZH surface should be 'NoSQL（Not Only SQL）' to match JP exactly; '数据库' belongs only in the definition.

findings.issue: EN name order inconsistency for '上峰亜衣' within the same page: Before-normalization table row uses 'Ai Kamine' (Western: given-family) but After-normalization table row uses 'Kamine Ai' (Japanese: family-given). Same person, same page.
findings.recommendation: Standardize to one convention; Western order 'Ai Kamine' is preferred for EN.

findings.issue: Phone number digit count differs between Before-normalization and After-normalization tables for same students: Student 1 '090-9999999X' (Before) vs '090-99999999X' (After); Student 2 '080-8888888X' (Before) vs '080-88888888X' (After). Likely OCR extra-digit artifact in After table, propagated to all three languages.
findings.recommendation: Verify against source image; normalize digit count to match Before table (10-digit format).

summary: Chunk 44 (pp.452-461, Relational Database sections 13-02 to 13-04): 105 leaves checked across 3 lenses × 3 languages. No encoding errors (U+FFFD, kana-in-zh, CJK-in-en), no duplicate IDs, no empty fields. 4 WARN findings: (1) p453 ZH uses non-standard product name '护照' instead of retained JP brand 'ITパスポート'; (2) p461 ZH NoSQL surface inflated with '数据库'; (3) p459 EN name order inconsistency ('Ai Kamine' vs 'Kamine Ai') for same person same page; (4) p459 phone number digit-count mismatch between Before/After normalization tables — likely OCR artifact. No CRITICAL or ERROR findings. Stage6 WARN on p453 is consistent with finding C44-F01.
